entity.summary: HyperEVM concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange providing token swaps, liquidity pools, NFT-based positions, configurable fee tiers, portfolio management, and protocol fee sharing.
entity.notes: Current first-party application exposes swap, liquidity, pool, and portfolio surfaces. First-party documentation identifies V3 concentrated-liquidity positions and the current swap-fee distribution between liquidity providers and protocol treasury.

evidence.title: Upheaval Finance official exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party HyperEVM application provides token swaps, liquidity pools, position management, and portfolio interfaces.

evidence.title: Upheaval fee documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes V3 concentrated-liquidity pool fee tiers and the distribution of swap fees to liquidity providers and the protocol treasury.
